subcodes.first_line: The Daystar of Hijaz, in the Persian tongue, maketh mention of His handmaidens, that they may become intoxicated with the divine nectar of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طلعت حجازی بلسان پارسی اماء خود را ذکر میفرماید تا از کوثر ذکر الهی سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
